patch.value: CONTEXT: suggestion-only aliases (pm show -> 'did you mean get') made agents retry; telemetry showed 312 nonexistent_command events/14d for pm show alone. DECISION: common agent-natural aliases (show/view->get, comment/note/learning(s) and --comment/--note/--learning->--add) are resolved at bootstrap before Commander parses argv, so the first invocation succeeds; suggestion-only aliases are never used for patterns that appear in real telemetry. CONSEQUENCES: agents succeed on first try; new high-frequency aliases must be executable rewrites kept in sync with completions; monitor nonexistent_command telemetry before each release. EVIDENCE: src/cli bootstrap/argv-utils; item pm-7by2; memory project_session_2026_05_30_pr83.
ADR: Never-block agent UX: high-frequency aliases are executable bootstrap rewrites, not suggestion text
Never-block agent UX: high-frequency aliases are executable bootstrap rewrites, not suggestion text
ADR recorded and accepted; architectural decision documented as durable context on 2026-05-31.
